properties.name: konfigyr.invitations.cleanup.cron
properties.description: Specifies the interval of the cleanup job that would remove expired namespace membership invitations. Defaults to every hour.

properties.name: konfigyr.namespace.service-catalog.scheduler-cron-expression
properties.description: Specifies the interval of the Service Catalog scheduler that would schedule pending Service Catalog rebuild tasks. Defaults to every second.

properties.name: konfigyr.audit.partitioning-cron
properties.description: Specifies the cron interval for the audit events table partitioning task. Defaults to every second.

properties.name: konfigyr.vault.change-history.partitioning-cron
properties.description: Specifies the cron interval for the change history table partitioning task. Defaults to every second.
